mechanism: Private credit $1.7T+ with appraisal-based reporting masks true economic volatility (2-3x reported). When a macro trigger forces marking to market or semi-liquid vehicle redemptions hit liquidity gates, the hidden vol is released and amplifies the regime transition. May also disrupt standard vol transmission sequencing.
regime_dependence: Dormant during benign credit conditions where appraisal-based reporting smooths returns. Activates during sustained high-vol credit regimes that force mark-to-market or trigger redemption pressure on semi-liquid vehicles.
